summary: All 6 features tested and PASSING: Public topic landing pages (/topic/career_clarity, /topic/marriage_planning) fetch packages from API, prices displayed from database (Focussed ₹2,999/₹3,999, Supported ₹6,999/₹8,999, Comprehensive ₹14,999/₹17,999), tier selector shows correct durations (4/8/12 weeks) from API, consultation info shows calls_included × call_duration_mins from API, switching between tiers updates price/features from API, 'Start my journey' button works and navigates to login page.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Package prices come from database (not hardcoded V6 data)
✓ Tier selector shows correct durations (4/8/12 weeks) from API duration_weeks field
✓ Consultation info correctly displays calls_included × call_duration_mins from API
✓ Switching between tiers dynamically updates price and features from API
✓ 'Start my journey' button navigates to login when unauthenticated
seed_data_creation: 12 packages seeded into admin_tiers collection by seed_packages.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Package API integration complete: /api/admin/public/package/:packageId endpoint returns package data from MongoDB admin_tiers collection. PublicTopicLandingPage.jsx fetches all 3 tiers (focussed, supported, comprehensive) for a topic and displays dynamic data. All package prices and features now come from database, not hardcoded.

career_clarity_topic_page.sticky_cta_bar: PASS - Shows correct price for selected tier
